series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting individuals or groups seeking to volunteer or perform volunteer activities at any Division of Forestry facility, program, or function, or otherwise volunteering under the supervision or direction of Division of Forestry staff.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Keep for one year after expiration date, then destroy. If scanned and saved in an electronic format, the paper copy may be destroyed at that time. ; Electronic: Keep for one year after expiration date, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
